implemented: Allowed metric_claim payload normalization to receive NormalizationContext.
Made selected missing-unit evidence gates inspect source context in addition to payload fields.
Added context-positive tests for ridership, vacancies, subway fires, train derailments, revenue vehicles, and traffic fatalities/injuries while retaining bare-payload negatives.
Added a composite safety rule for traffic_fatalities_and_injuries requiring fatality and injury evidence.
Threaded context through existing gated ridership, vacancy, safety, rating, and test-count rules.

materialized_effect.reason_not_cleared: The materialized rows did not carry enough non-name source context into the normalizer for those gates. They remain candidates for narrow payload-only gates or source/payload repair, not broad inference.

next_candidates: Narrow payload-only ridership gate for high-confidence million-rider rail rows with agency/entity context.
Narrow subway_fires gate requiring subway scope and date/period.
Decide whether revenue_vehicles under Bridges & Tunnels is vehicle crossings rather than riders before normalizing.
Defer ambiguous program/procurement/workforce and conflicting EEO basis rows until source-specific repair is safe.
